q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: urllib.request.urlopen() is network I/O, causing external resolution and side effects.

mock_guidance.capture: Capture the first argument (the URL string from params['include']) to verify SSRF reachability and payload reflection.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a fake HTTP response object (e.g., a mock with read() returning an empty byte string and status 200) to allow execution to continue without performing real network I/O.
notes: Ensure the mock handles both local file paths and URLs if the conditional on line 56 is exercised.
Do not attempt to resolve or connect to the captured URL.
